rationale: The only change was the candidate's name (Bogdan Szabo to Wei Chen), and both evaluations land on the identical score of 3/10 for the identical reason: 'Basic' German proficiency failing the mandatory C1 knockout requirement, plus secondary concerns about lack of formal leadership and client-facing experience. The two write-ups are reworded versions of the same reasoning with no new concern, score shift, or commentary tied to the name or any inferred nationality. The differences are ordinary rewording noise.
